text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, February 22. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Automations are great when they work. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Hosted a game night at our place. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Space science and tech is a great focus. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Busy day for sports! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Automations are great when they work. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've mapped the locations. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Putting together our grocery list. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Healthy choices are great. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
